Video.summary: Witness a battle for survival at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai as two powerhouse teams, the Rajasthan Titans and Pune United, fight to secure their first tie victory of the season. The energy is palpable as Pune United's Katie Morris looks for redemption after a tough opening night, while the Titans rely on the aggressive play of Lorena Dupnik and the "superb power" of volleyball-pro-turned-pickleballer Isabella Nelson. From the intense "grind" of 15-minute singles matches to the high-speed tactical exchanges of men’s and women’s doubles, every point is a step toward climbing the league ladder. Don't miss the strategic masterclasses, including high-stakes challenges and game-changing "Pickle Plays," that keep the Mumbai crowd on the edge of their seats.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2

Video.summary: Experience the high-octane energy of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) Season 2 as the Bengaluru Jawans go head-to-head with the Rajasthan Titans at the iconic Jio World Garden in Mumbai. The stakes are higher than ever in this Day 9, Tie 16 clash, featuring elite matchups such as the "women's singles player of the season" Katrina Stewart facing off against the resilient Lorena Dupnik. Watch as tactical masters like Dusty Boyer and Jack Foster battle for supremacy in a series of intense singles and mixed doubles competitions where every point counts toward the league standings. With game-changing "Pickle Plays" and atmospheric "drums" fueling the intensity, this tie is a masterclass in professional grit and strategic precision.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1

Video.summary: It's the moment of truth! Championship Sunday has arrived for the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as the Bengaluru Jawans take on Pune United for the title. Prepare yourself for an intense matchup -from Men's Singles right through to Mixed Doubles!
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Video.summary: Day 4 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) presents a crucial matchup between Pune United and the high-performing Bengaluru Jawans. For Pune, this is a must-win match to keep their semi-final hopes alive, while Bengaluru is on top of their game.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Bengaluru - Day 4 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Bengaluru - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Bengaluru - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Bengaluru - Day 4 Tie 2

Video.summary: The action continues on Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) with the highly anticipated second matchup: Delhi takes on Mumbai Pickle Power at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai.This matchup features a spectacular lineup, including Delhi's players Alexa Schule, Eduardo Irizarry, and Willie Chung, against a strong Mumbai squad that includes Brandon Lane, Glauca Lane, and Kim Ngo.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2

Video.summary: Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) kicks off with an exciting matchup between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru team. This matchup begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match: Hyderabad's local talent, Kuldeep Mahajan, faces Bengaluru's Jack Foster from the United States.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

Video.summary: This championship game highlights the strategic play, including lobs and speed-ups, as both teams battle for the gold. A key dynamic of this match is that Courter and Carter had the advantage of playing under the shaded court conditions just before, while Dawson and Williams were coming from outside. Jen Dawson is noted as being a seasoned player on this court, having a triple crown in the Senior Pro divisions.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams
US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams
US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams

Video.summary: Get ready for thrilling Pro Men's Doubles pickleball action from the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships at East Naples Community Park, the National Pickleball Center! This semi-final match features the dynamic duo of Richard Livornese Jr. and Ryler Deheart against the formidable team of Ben Newell and Brandon Lane. Witness incredible rallies, aggressive plays, and strategic dinks as these top players battle it out for a spot in Championship Saturday. Don't miss this high-energy competition from the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell

Video.summary: Welcome back to the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships for the Men's Pro Doubles semifinal match. This is a great representation of the sport's global growth, with the top-ranked player from India competing. The match features teams Munro and Yang against Bhatia and Mehta. The match is tightly contested, with the level of play stepping up as they enter the semi-finals. The caption file also notes that Bhatia's grandfather was a world-renowned cricketer in India with the nickname "the Sultan of Swing," which is comparable to an NFL star like Tom Brady.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Video.summary: In this gripping quarterfinal from the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, Helen Wilhelm and Anna Shirley face Suzanne LeBlang and Teresa Tarn in a thrilling three-game battle. Featuring powerful strokes, smart resets, and tactical momentum shifts, this senior pro women’s doubles match highlights both experience and finesse. Watch as the teams adapt and clash in a showcase of skill and strategy at the highest level.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn

Video.summary: Simone Jardim & Jaime Oncins take on Eva Welsher & Kyle Yates in a Mixed Pro split age Gold medal match
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Gold Medal

US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Gold Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Gold Medal

Video.summary: Two of the sport’s biggest names meet in this Women’s Pro Singles pre-medal match at the 2023 US Open. Parris Todd and Simone Jardim bring elite-level strategy, precision, and intensity to the court in a pivotal semifinal showdown. Who will rise to the challenge and advance?
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim

Video.summary: In this high-stakes Bronze Medal match at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, veteran competitors Jenny Klitch and Sheri Courter go head-to-head with Ellen Novoseletsky and Jenny Marcos. Expect calculated teamwork, steady hands, and sharp strategy as these seasoned senior pros compete for a podium finish. Filmed live from Naples, Florida, this match showcases the competitive spirit and skill that define senior pro pickleball.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos

Video.summary: November 28, 2023 - Welcome to week 10 - season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Gilbert Gladiators face-off against the Surprise Stingers.

November 28, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: Join us LIVE for the Florida Pro-Am Circuit – Day 1 from The Hub Jacksonville, FL. Catch a full day of elite pickleball competition as top regional and national players compete in the Florida Pro-Am for their chance to win cash, medals, and crucial DUPR rating points.
Video.title: LIVE: Florida Pro-Am Circuit Day 1 from Jacksonville, FL

Image.alt: LIVE: Florida Pro-Am Circuit Day 1 from Jacksonville, FL
LIVE: Florida Pro-Am Circuit Day 1 from Jacksonville, FL
